title: IPE Amendment / Goal Change
desc: You want to change your training goal, but your VRC refuses to update the plan.

fields.name: changeReason
fields.label: Reason for the change (e.g. condition worsened)
fields.placeholder: e.g. Physical standing requirements aggravate back condition

errors: Arbitrarily denying plan changes when medical condition or limitations have changed.
Refusing to issue a written decision notice when IPE amendment request is denied.
